scope: Add IntegratedSnapshotIoLeaseBarrierRecord as first-class integrated scenario evidence
Tie S14 SmpSnapshotBarrier, I10 IoCleanup, and G10 DisplaySnapshotBarrier into one generation-checked snapshot closure scenario
Require exact generations for SmpSnapshotBarrier, IoCleanup, DisplaySnapshotBarrier, Store, DeviceObject, DisplayObject, and FramebufferObject
Derive active lease counts and cleanup release/revoke counts from semantic source records
Reject missing, stale, dirty, incomplete, or count-drifted snapshot/io/display evidence
Emit IntegratedSnapshotIoLeaseBarrierRecorded event and stable osctl ViewV1 JSON
Expose historical graph edges without creating live ownership or substrate mapping truth
Publish target_executor semantic package roots and count validation for X6 evidence

implemented_contract_clauses.clause: X6 snapshot barrier blocks active IO leases
all integrated snapshot/io lease barrier references carry kind/id/generation
integrated scenario uses Historical graph edges for snapshot, cleanup, device, display, and framebuffer attribution
completed cleanup records are validator-visible evidence for released IO authority
osctl exposes stable ViewV1 JSON and contract validation output

findings_fixed: contract graph models IntegratedSnapshotIoLeaseBarrier as exact-generation integrated evidence
target_executor writes X6 records, roots, and counts into the semantic package
target_executor includes the referenced driver store generation in contract validation evidence
osctl command, inspect, replay, and graph history expose integrated-snapshot-io-lease-barrier evidence through stable ViewV1 JSON
semantic validation rejects missing barrier evidence, stale display snapshot barrier generation, and source cleanup count drift
bad_smells_checked: No substrate DMA/MMIO/IRQ mapping became semantic truth
No real snapshot or hardware DMA execution is claimed
No display adapter internal state became semantic truth
No adapter internal structs are serialized as osctl stable views
No target-side cwasm execution path was changed
No third-party dependency was introduced in semantic_core
residual_notes: X7 owns code publish while SMP workload active
Future real snapshot and device paths must feed the same semantic barrier and cleanup objects rather than bypassing X6 evidence

validation_commands.command: cargo check -p semantic_core -p artifact_manifest -p contract_core -p target_executor -p osctl

residual_gaps: X7 owns code publish while SMP workload active
Real snapshot, device, and display paths must later provide runtime-backed evidence through the existing semantic objects
